reason: Acceptance criteria: no-restart toggle/TTL effect, clamp coverage, unchanged defaults, audit ttl_seconds accuracy, 6-locale i18n.
Check gate/TTL/audit wiring matches design; startup validation and claim semantics must be unchanged from task 07-11.
Verify billing-safety invariants (bounded operator input, no bare casts, audited saturation) and test style (testify require/assert).
Frontend quality bar for the new settings section (i18n keys, build checks).
